author: GenesisAutomator
title: Issue.detail untyped dict[str, Any] bag — duplicate of S012
summary: Same finding as S012 (@taco-devs): Issue.detail is an untyped dict[str,Any] serving 13+ detector-specific schemas. S012 was already verified as YES_WITH_CAVEATS. S243 adds no novel insight — same file, same field, same critique. The S012 verification file explicitly lists S243 as a known duplicate.
